overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The camera moves along a covered pedestrian walkway with neon lighting, passing by luxury storefronts, bamboo landscaping, and approaching a street crosswalk with digital billboards. The wet pavement reflects the cyan and orange neon lights, creating a cinematic atmosphere typical of high-end game engine rendering.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins along a covered pedestrian walkway in a futuristic city at night. The camera moves past a luxury building entrance where NPCs stand near red velvet ropes and modern benches. The wet tiled pavement reflects the overhead cyan neon lights, and the area feels sheltered and upscale.

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues past large bamboo planters and a dark glass building facade with golden accent lighting. The crowd thins out as the camera moves deeper along the covered path, approaching an opening where digital billboards and street lights become visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a street corner with large digital billboards illuminating the area. The camera approaches a crosswalk where pedestrians are crossing the wet street, some carrying umbrellas. The covered walkway recedes to the left as the camera waits at the crosswalk edge, with palm trees and futuristic vehicle traffic visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, upscale pedestrian corridor into the open, neon-drenched bustle of a futuristic city street. It begins along a covered walkway, gliding past a luxury building entrance where NPCs gather near red velvet ropes and cyan neon lights reflect off the wet tiled pavement. As the camera moves deeper into the passage, the scene shifts past large bamboo planters and dark glass facades accented with gold, while the crowd thins toward a distant opening. The environment then expands as the camera exits the shelter and reaches a street corner dominated by towering digital billboards. Finally, the view opens fully onto a rain-slicked crosswalk filled with pedestrians and umbrellas, with the covered walkway receding to the left to reveal palm trees and futuristic traffic.
